Uses of Class
com.github.copilot.rpc.SessionConfig

Packages that use SessionConfig
Package
Description
com.github.copilot
Core classes for the GitHub Copilot SDK for Java.
com.github.copilot.rpc
Configuration classes and data transfer objects for the Copilot SDK.

  • Uses of SessionConfig in com.github.copilot

    Methods in com.github.copilot with parameters of type SessionConfig
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<CopilotSession>
    CopilotClient.createSession(SessionConfig config)
    Creates a new Copilot session with the specified configuration.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearCoauthorEnabled()
    Clears the coauthorEnabled setting.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearCustomAgentsLocalOnly()
    Clears the customAgentsLocalOnly setting.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearEmbeddingCacheStorage()
    Clears the embeddingCacheStorage setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearEnableConfigDiscovery()
    Clears the enableConfigDiscovery setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearEnableFileHooks()
    Clears the enableFileHooks setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearEnableHostGitOperations()
    Clears the enableHostGitOperations setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearEnableOnDemandInstructionDiscovery()
    Clears the enableOnDemandInstructionDiscovery setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearEnableSessionStore()
    Clears the enableSessionStore setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearEnableSessionTelemetry()
    Clears the enableSessionTelemetry setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearEnableSkills()
    Clears the enableSkills setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearIncludeSubAgentStreamingEvents()
    Clears the includeSubAgentStreamingEvents setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearManageScheduleEnabled()
    Clears the manageScheduleEnabled setting.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearSkipCustomInstructions()
    Clears the skipCustomInstructions setting.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clearSkipEmbeddingRetrieval()
    Clears the skipEmbeddingRetrieval setting, reverting to the default behavior.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.clone()
    Creates a shallow clone of this SessionConfig instance.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setAgent(String agent)
    Sets the name of the custom agent to activate when the session starts.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setAvailableTools(List<String> availableTools)
    Sets the list of tool names that are allowed in this session.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setClientName(String clientName)
    Sets the client name to identify the application using the SDK.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setCloud(CloudSessionOptions cloud)
    Sets the cloud session options.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setCoauthorEnabled(boolean coauthorEnabled)
    Sets whether the runtime is allowed to append a Co-authored-by trailer when it commits on behalf of the user.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setCommands(List<CommandDefinition> commands)
    Sets slash commands registered for this session.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setConfigDirectory(String configDirectory)
    Sets a custom configuration directory for the session.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setContextTier(String contextTier)
    Sets the context window tier for models that support it.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setCustomAgents(List<CustomAgentConfig> customAgents)
    Sets custom agent configurations.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setCustomAgentsLocalOnly(boolean customAgentsLocalOnly)
    Sets whether custom-agent discovery is restricted to the session's local working directory (no organisation-level discovery).
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setDefaultAgent(DefaultAgentConfig defaultAgent)
    Sets the default agent configuration.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setDisabledSkills(List<String> disabledSkills)
    Sets the list of skill names to disable.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setEmbeddingCacheStorage(String embeddingCacheStorage)
    Sets the embedding cache storage mode.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setEnableConfigDiscovery(boolean enableConfigDiscovery)
    Sets whether to automatically discover MCP server configurations and skill directories from the working directory.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setEnableFileHooks(boolean enableFileHooks)
    Sets whether file-based hooks from .github/hooks/ are enabled.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setEnableHostGitOperations(boolean enableHostGitOperations)
    Sets whether git operations on the host filesystem are enabled.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setEnableMcpApps(boolean enableMcpApps)
    Enables MCP Apps (SEP-1865) UI passthrough on this session.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setEnableOnDemandInstructionDiscovery(boolean enableOnDemandInstructionDiscovery)
    Sets whether instruction files are discovered on demand.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setEnableSessionStore(boolean enableSessionStore)
    Sets whether the cross-session store is enabled.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setEnableSessionTelemetry(boolean enableSessionTelemetry)
    Enables or disables internal session telemetry for this session.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setEnableSkills(boolean enableSkills)
    Sets whether skill loading is enabled.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setExcludedTools(List<String> excludedTools)
    Sets the list of tool names to exclude from this session.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setGitHubToken(String gitHubToken)
    Sets the GitHub token for per-session authentication.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setHooks(SessionHooks hooks)
    Sets hook handlers for session lifecycle events.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setIncludeSubAgentStreamingEvents(boolean includeSubAgentStreamingEvents)
    Sets whether to include sub-agent streaming events in the event stream.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setInfiniteSessions(InfiniteSessionConfig infiniteSessions)
    Sets the infinite session configuration for persistent workspaces and automatic compaction.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setInstructionDirectories(List<String> instructionDirectories)
    Sets additional directories to search for custom instruction files.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setLargeOutput(LargeToolOutputConfig largeOutput)
    Sets the configuration for large tool output handling.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setManageScheduleEnabled(boolean manageScheduleEnabled)
    Sets whether to enable the manage_schedule tool (host scheduler integration).
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setMcpOAuthTokenStorage(String mcpOAuthTokenStorage)
    Sets the MCP OAuth token storage mode.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setMcpServers(Map<String, McpServerConfig> mcpServers)
    Sets MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configurations.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setModel(String model)
    Sets the AI model to use for this session.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setModelCapabilities(ModelCapabilitiesOverride modelCapabilities)
    Sets per-property overrides for model capabilities, deep-merged over runtime defaults.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setOnAutoModeSwitch(AutoModeSwitchHandler onAutoModeSwitch)
    Sets a handler for auto-mode-switch requests from the server.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setOnElicitationRequest(ElicitationHandler onElicitationRequest)
    Sets a handler for elicitation requests from the server or MCP tools.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setOnEvent(Consumer<SessionEvent> onEvent)
    Sets an event handler that is registered on the session before the session.create RPC is issued.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setOnExitPlanMode(ExitPlanModeHandler onExitPlanMode)
    Sets a handler for exit-plan-mode requests from the server.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setOnPermissionRequest(PermissionHandler onPermissionRequest)
    Sets a handler for permission requests from the assistant.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setOnUserInputRequest(UserInputHandler onUserInputRequest)
    Sets a handler for user input requests from the agent.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setOrganizationCustomInstructions(String organizationCustomInstructions)
    Sets organization-level custom instructions.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setPluginDirectories(List<String> pluginDirectories)
    Sets the plugin directories to load Open Plugin definitions from.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setProvider(ProviderConfig provider)
    Sets a custom API provider for BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) scenarios.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setReasoningEffort(String reasoningEffort)
    Sets the reasoning effort level for models that support it.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setReasoningSummary(String reasoningSummary)
    Sets the reasoning summary mode for models that support configurable reasoning summaries.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setRemoteSession(String remoteSession)
    Sets the per-session remote behavior control.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setSessionId(String sessionId)
    Sets a custom session ID.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setSkillDirectories(List<String> skillDirectories)
    Sets the skill directories for loading custom skills.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setSkipCustomInstructions(boolean skipCustomInstructions)
    Sets whether to suppress loading of custom instruction files (e.g.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setSkipEmbeddingRetrieval(boolean skipEmbeddingRetrieval)
    Sets whether to skip embedding-based retrieval.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setStreaming(boolean streaming)
    Sets whether to enable streaming of response chunks.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setSystemMessage(SystemMessageConfig systemMessage)
    Sets the system message configuration.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setTools(List<ToolDefinition> tools)
    Sets custom tools that the assistant can invoke during the session.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setWorkingDirectory(String workingDirectory)
    Sets the working directory for the session.
